description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a striking blue cover, adorned with a large, central purple oval framed by four metallic-looking square embellishments at the corners. The cover has a slightly raised, beveled border, giving it a sturdy and ornate appearance. The spine features three prominent, horizontal metallic bands, suggesting reinforced binding and durability. The pages are a light tan color, visible from the side and top, and appear to be made of standard paper. The overall design is reminiscent of a fantasy or magical tome, with a decorative yet functional aesthetic. There are no visible illustrations or text on the cover, emphasizing the geometric and color-based design.
description: A thick, blue hardbound book with a central purple oval and metallic square decorations, featuring a reinforced spine and tan pages.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the blue surface, central purple oval, and four metallic square decorations.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thickness of the book, the tan pages, and the raised cover details.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the solid blue back cover and the visible edges of the tan pages.
description_view_3: Spine view showing three metallic horizontal bands and the edge of the purple oval on the cover.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue with three prominent, horizontal metallic bands spaced evenly along its length. No text or additional decorative elements are visible.
